creator: vivek@kciLink.com
text:
Attempting to upgrade openjdk-7.55.13_3,1 to openjdk-7.55.13_4,1 fails rather quickly with this error:

BUILD FAILED
/var/tmp/n/yertle1/sources/ports/java/openjdk7/work/openjdk/langtools/make/build.xml:860: Error running /usr/local/openjdk7/bin/javac compiler

However, javac works just fine for pretty much everything else. Full
log is appended below.

Fix: 

unknown.
How-To-Repeat: 	

[root@vk-dev]# make showconfig
===> The following configuration options are available for openjdk-7.55.13_4,1:
     DEBUG=off: Enable extra debugging info
     POLICY=on: Install the Unlimited Strength Policy Files
     TZUPDATE=on: Update the time zone data
===> Use 'make config' to modify these settings

I do not have fdescfs mounted, as /dev/fd already exists on my system
from devfs.

Attempt to build 7.55.13_4,1 with 7.55.13_3,1 installed:

[root@vk-dev]# make
===>  Building for openjdk-7.55.13_4,1
